message:
feat(ui): add sparkline bar chart to empty-state dashboard and responsive wide-mode layout

Adds a decorative sparkline bar chart to the analytics dashboard
empty-state view when terminal height >= 14 and width >= 40, giving
visual texture to what was previously a plain text placeholder.

Also introduces a wide_mode flag (width >= 130) for responsive layout
adjustments in the agent-activity and session-timeline chart sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
